data.body: 9f40 (doc drift) committed+pushed (c9c24c4d). api-stability 0.6->0.7.1, event-schema ticket_txn.py->_commands/txn.py, README +rebar idea/explain, new test_version_sync.py (CI guard as unit test). KEPT bash-migration.md (14 inbound refs incl 9 source docstrings — deletion premise false); config.py:442 marker already gone via 7c92. Next: 44be (reconciler vendor-adapter sub-package, biggest/riskiest — delegate).
